narrative:
Symmes A (precinct in Hamilton County) has 310 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 26.8%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.2 percentage points.
